title: phalaris minor
intro: Phalaris minor, also known as small or lesser cock's-foot, is a type of grassy weed that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phalaris minor include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
